route.name: Red Feather Ramble
route.region: Fort Collins / Red Feather Lakes / Roosevelt NF
route.description: Public GPX Front Range loop with gravel, forest roads, pavement connectors, and big climbing.
route.surfaceMix: Public GPX Front Range loop with gravel, forest roads, pavement connectors, and big climbing.
route.bestSeason: Mid-late June to early October; July requires storm, smoke, and camp/parking checks.

difficultyProfile.surface: Public GPX Front Range loop with gravel, forest roads, pavement connectors, and big climbing.
difficultyProfile.traffic: review paved connectors and trailhead access
difficultyProfile.technical: moderate unless source notes say otherwise

resources.water: Several creek crossings; carry a filter and verify gaps.
resources.food: Limited services in Rustic and Red Feather Lakes; confirm hours.
resources.camping: Camping near Pingree Park Road and Red Feather Lakes must be selected and verified.
resources.toiletsShowers: Use mapped waypoints and land-manager pages; confirm current operation before departure.
resources.bikeShops: Identify nearest shops and exact hours during final trip refresh.
resources.longestGap: Measure from imported GPX and source POIs before gate confirmation.
resources.mosquitoes: Seasonal; check recent reports for camp and water-adjacent sections.

tips: Measure water gaps from the GPX.

verification.notes: Public GPX imported and parsed locally. Final legal/resource checks still control gate confirmation.

mapQuality.reviewRule: Route line is imported from public GPX and suitable for planning review.
